scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @monopoly/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @monopoly/shared-config && npm run build --workspace @monopoly/game-engine && npm run build --workspace @monopoly/api && npm run build --workspace @monopoly/game-server && npm run build --workspace @monopoly/web
scripts.test:game-engine: npm run build --workspace @monopoly/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @monopoly/shared-config && npm run build --workspace @monopoly/game-engine && npm run test --workspace @monopoly/game-engine
